since_last: 45% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.95%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 45% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -1.34% · Gold +0.54% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 45% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.95%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.95%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.47%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MGNI is the standout at +9.97%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +9.97%, TLN +5.33%, ASML +4.33%, DV +3.61%, INTC +3.23%. Laggards: SNAP -8.93%, CRNC -6.11%, SMR -4.80%, OKLO -4.38%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.08% at $208.02
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.08% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
